overview.description: Cybersecurity in Vietnam is a growing priority as digital transformation accelerates across sectors. AI use cases include threat detection, log anomaly analysis, vulnerability prioritization, and automated incident response.
overview.marketSizeVietnam: ~$500M cybersecurity market; government mandating security standards for critical infrastructure
overview.marketSizeSEA: ~$5B cybersecurity market; ransomware and state-sponsored attacks driving investment

domainKnowledge.typicalDataVolume: Very high — security logs in enterprise environments are massive (TB/day)
domainKnowledge.dataQuality: Medium — structured SIEM data good; correlation across tools still challenging

painPoints.problem: Alert fatigue — security teams drowning in false positives from SIEM tools
Advanced persistent threats (APTs) evade signature-based detection
Log analysis for incident investigation is manual and slow
Vulnerability prioritization across thousands of CVEs is overwhelming

relatedNodes.description: Telecom and cybersecurity overlap in network threat detection.
Finance is cybersecurity highest-priority sector in Vietnam.
